import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = xs.len() - 1
  while lo <= hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match xs.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target
        return Some(mid)
      else if v < target
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      return None
    end
  end
  None
end

fn solve(_ l1: String, _ l2: String) -> Unit
  let xs = parse_ints(l1)
  let ts = parse_ints(l2)
  match ts.get(0)
  when Some(t)
    match bsearch(xs, t)
    when Some(i)
      print("index=#{i}")
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(l1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l2)
    solve(l1, l2)
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
